title: Blazen pricing.json
description: Per-model pricing data baked into blazen-llm at build time and served live via https://blazen.dev/api/pricing.json. Keys in `models` MUST be normalized model ids: lowercase, with provider prefix and date suffix already stripped (matches crates/blazen-llm/src/pricing.rs::normalize_model_id rules). All `$`-prefixed top-level keys are metadata and ignored by the build script.
